creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Budget travel hack if you want your money to stretch further 🇩🇰

The app is called TooGoodToGo ✌️

I’ve used this app for a few years and mainly used it to get these massive bags from bakeries. You never know what you’re going to get, but I’ve always felt that it’s incredible value for money - especially if you get the ones from the supermarket bakeries; the amount of stuff you get there is pretty insane 😅

The app is also available in Vienna, Amsterdam, Rome, Paris, Lisbon, Prague, Barcelona, to name a few - and New York City as well it seems 🌎

Have you tried @toogoodtogo.dk? 👀

transcription.text: Here's a quick travel tip if you're coming to Copenhagen on a budget. I hate it when I buy a pastry in Copenhagen and my bank immediately calls me up to ask me what the hell I think I'm doing. So today I'm using this app where you can get massive discounts on leftover food from bakeries, supermarkets and restaurants. I paid 29 kroner for this massive bag of bread and cakes from a well expensive bakery. And this is not even an ad, I just wanted to share the app with you guys because I truly think it's awesome.
